_comment: Copy to sources.json and edit. Scheduler fills scripts/queue/ only; generation/review/publish stay manual. Low-risk sources only: official APIs, first-party blogs, CC-licensed or content-carrying feeds. Facts-only transformative rewriting + attribution (see prompts/style_guide.md). Tested 2026-07-10: MIT News AI & Microsoft Research feeds carry full body (6-12K chars); OpenAI News & Google AI Blog carry summaries only (unsuitable).
